que: What is the primary purpose of the SingleChildScrollView widget in Flutter?
options: To scroll multiple children in a list
To make a single child scrollable
To show a grid of items

que: SingleChildScrollView is commonly used for:
options: Forms and layouts that may overflow

que: Which parameter of SingleChildScrollView is required?
Which parameter defines the axis along which the child scrolls?
What is the default value of scrollDirection in SingleChildScrollView?
Which parameter controls the scroll position in SingleChildScrollView?
What does the reverse parameter do in SingleChildScrollView?
What is the default value of the reverse parameter in SingleChildScrollView?
Which of the following is a recommended use case for SingleChildScrollView?
options: Content that may overflow the screen

que: Which of the following is listed as something to avoid with SingleChildScrollView?
options: Using for large lists—use ListView or GridView instead

que: Which widgets are suggested to combine with SingleChildScrollView for flexible layouts?
What should you not forget when using SingleChildScrollView with custom behavior?
options: To always set reverse to true
To manage scroll controllers for custom behavior

que: SingleChildScrollView extends which base class?
Which parameter can be used to add inner padding around the child of SingleChildScrollView?
What is the default value of clipBehavior in SingleChildScrollView?
Which parameter controls how drag gestures are recognized in SingleChildScrollView?
What is the default value of dragStartBehavior in SingleChildScrollView?
Which parameter controls how the keyboard is dismissed when scrolling?
What is the default keyboardDismissBehavior for SingleChildScrollView?
Which parameter indicates whether this is the primary scroll view associated with the primary ScrollController?
Which parameter can be used to provide custom ScrollPhysics to SingleChildScrollView?
Which parameter in SingleChildScrollView is used for state restoration?
Which of these is a good example use case for SingleChildScrollView?
options: A whole chat messages list with thousands of items
A login form that might overflow vertically on small screens
